description: Set Up CI Automations - GitHub Actions workflow to run quality checks (lint, typecheck, tests) on every push and PR

userStories.title: Create GitHub Actions CI workflow with all quality checks
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a GitHub Actions workflow that runs lint, typecheck, and tests on every push and PR so that I get automatic feedback on code quality.
acceptanceCriteria: Workflow triggers on `push` to any branch
Workflow triggers on `pull_request` to any branch
Workflow sets up Node.js 20 using `actions/setup-node` with `cache: 'npm'`
Workflow runs `npm run lint` as a separate step and fails on errors
Workflow runs `npm run typecheck` as a separate step and fails on errors
Workflow runs `npm test` as a separate step and fails on test failures

userStories.title: Add branch protection documentation to PR description
userStories.description: As a repository maintainer, I want documentation on how to configure branch protection rules so that the main branch requires CI checks to pass before merging.
acceptanceCriteria: PR description includes instructions for enabling branch protection on `main`
Instructions specify requiring the CI workflow status check to pass before merging
Instructions mention requiring PR reviews (recommended but optional)
userStories.notes: This story is documentation-only in the PR description, no code changes needed
